name: Synthetic Construction Partner 23 – Contractor Countries Of Projects Not Stated
activities: Meridian Contracting Ltd is described in the onboarding notes as a contractor executing 'government infrastructure projects abroad' — roads and utilities commissioned by national authorities — which form the bulk of its business. The notes do not identify the countries in which these projects are located or which governments award the contracts, and the requested project list and contract summaries have not yet been received.
